hero.greeting: Need a website that actually brings in clients?
hero.tagline: You dream it, I Manon it.
hero.bio: Behind every beautiful website is someone who makes the difference. I design, write and build websites that are fast, findable on Google and built to convert visitors into clients. From design and code to copy and SEO, all under one roof. So you can focus on what you do best.
hero.roles: Web Development • Web Design • Copywriting • SEO • React

about.title: Designer. Writer. Developer.
about.quote:
I build what I used to have to explain.
From idea to design to working code.
about.bio1: I love it when something just works. When an idea, a design and the execution fit together seamlessly.
about.bio2: My path was anything but straight. From the Gerrit Rietveld Academie to SAE Institute and the Schrijversacademie, always searching for how to make something not just beautiful, but also understandable.
about.bio3: After years working for clients like Renault, the Municipality of Amsterdam and KLM, I noticed something frustrating: I could see exactly what could be better… but I couldn't always build it myself.
about.bio4: So I decided to change that. I retrained as a Full Stack Developer at NOVI College. Because I no longer wanted a gap between idea and execution.
about.bio5: Now I design, write and build myself. And I make sure that what you create not only makes sense, but actually lands with the people it's meant for.
about.journalCta: Curious about my writing, interviews and travel stories?

skills.stack: Full stack: React, Spring Boot, Git

services.label: What I do
services.title: Everything in one place
services.intro: Everything a website needs, in one place. You just have to tell me what you want.

websites.name: Websites & Apps
websites.desc: From a WordPress site to a fully custom React web app. Fast, secure and mobile-friendly.

design.name: Web Design
design.desc: A site that looks great and actually fits you. Not an off-the-shelf template, but a design that shows your brand.

copy.desc: Text that works. Clear, to the point and written for the people you want to reach.

seo.desc: Getting found starts with the basics. I make sure your site is technically and content-wise ready for Google.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: From first message to going live
howItWorks.intro: No surprises, no confusion. This is how we work together.

meet.title: Meeting
meet.text: We schedule a 30-minute call. Free, no obligations. You tell me what you need, I tell you what I can do.

quote.title: Quote
quote.text: You receive a clear quote with price, timeline and exactly what you'll get. Once agreed, we get started.

build.title: Building
build.text: I work in short rounds. You see progress as we go, give feedback and it keeps getting better.

launch.title: Live
launch.text: The site goes live. You get a short guide so you can handle small updates yourself. And I stay reachable.

testimonials.label: What clients say
testimonials.title: Reviews
testimonials.sub: Real experiences from people I have worked with.

saskia.quote: Professional, decisive and collaborative! A breath of fresh air. And great that she dares to think 'out of the box'. I recommend Manon 100%!

marie.quote: During my recovery (I headbutted a mountain in the Alps and rattled my brain), I told ManonIT that I wanted to give my creative stories and ideas a place on my own website. She took care of everything from there. She asked about my wishes regarding style, setup and background, and built it faster than I could type. Now that my website is live, all I can say is: Manon, thank you for listening, for building, for rebuilding after good consultation, and of course for the aftercare with an extensive manual! I dreamed it up, ManonIT built it.

villa.quote: I thought we just needed a few pages. Manon kept asking questions until she could tell the story of Villa Vredestein better than I could at the bar. The result: a site with no frills, exactly like us, yet surprising enough to keep visitors reading longer than planned. Then she went and built a rental dashboard for our student rooms too, complete with payments, contracts and a cleaning schedule, and suddenly I had no spreadsheet left to curse at.
